item.title: Hardware
item.description: Three nodes, two architectures, one 200 Gbps cable.

item.title: Identity: Keycloak
item.description: Centralized OIDC SSO for every service in the cluster.

item.title: Architecture
item.description: How the cluster is organized — FluxCD dependency chains, traffic flow, and component relationships.

item.title: Observability
item.description: Metrics, tracing, and dashboards — VictoriaMetrics, Grafana, Jaeger, Hubble, and Headlamp.

item.title: Messaging
item.description: Three message brokers for three different patterns — Kafka, NATS, and RabbitMQ.

item.title: Networking
item.description: Cilium, MetalLB, Gateway API, Tailscale, and a 200 Gbps RDMA interconnect.

item.title: Serverless: Knative
item.description: Knative Serving for scale-to-zero workloads, Eventing backed by Kafka.

item.title: Storage
item.description: Longhorn v1 data engine for distributed block storage.

item.title: Dev Platform
item.description: Coder CDEs, Temporal workflows, GitHub Actions runners, Terraform agents, and Camel K.

item.title: GitOps
item.description: FluxCD-driven reconciliation — if it’s not in Git, it doesn’t exist.

item.title: Argo Suite
item.description: ArgoCD for application GitOps, Argo Workflows for DAG execution, Argo Events for triggers.

item.title: GPU & AI
item.description: NVIDIA DGX Spark GPU stack, SR-IOV RDMA, and multi-node training with NCCL.

item.title: Stack Reference
item.description: Every component running in the cluster, at a glance.

item.title: My RDMA Journey with DGX Spark
item.description: Why I bought two DGX Sparks, what RDMA actually is, and where I’m at with getting it working in Kubernetes.

item.title: SR-IOV on Talos: Why the Operator Doesn't Work
item.description: The SR-IOV Network Operator crashes on Talos Linux. Here’s the standalone device plugin I built instead.
